debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
A : Finset ι
m : ℕ
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
inst✝² : IsFiniteMeasure μ
mE : MeasurableSpace E
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
X : ι → Ω → E
iIndepFun_X : iIndepFun X μ
identDistrib_neg_X : ∀ (i : ι), IdentDistrib (X i) (-X i) μ μ
memLp_X : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X i) (2 * ↑m) μ
this : DecidableEq ι
I : Fin m → ι × ι
hI : I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A
⊢ Integrable (fun ω => ∏ k, ‖X (I k).1 ω‖ * ‖X (I k).2 ω‖) μ

set p : ℝ≥0∞ := 2 * m
    have h_mem k j : MemLp (fun ω ↦ ‖X (I k).j ω‖) p μ :=
      (memLp_X _ (mem_piFinset.1 hI k).j).norm
    induction m with
    | zero => simp; exact integrable_const 1
    | succ m ih =>
      rw [Fin.prod_univ_succ]
      apply MemLp.integrable (p := 1)
      have hp : p = 2 * (m + 1) := rpow_nat_cast 2 (m + 1) ▸ rfl
      have h1 : MemLp (fun ω ↦ ‖X (I (0 : Fin (m + 1))).1 ω‖ * ‖X (I 0).2 ω‖) (m + 1) μ :=
        (h_mem 0 1).mul (h_mem 0 2) (by simp [hp, ← two_mul, mul_inv_rev])
      have h2 : MemLp (fun ω ↦ ∏ k : Fin m, ‖X (I k.succ).1 ω‖ * ‖X (I k.succ).2 ω‖) ((m + 1) : ℝ≥0) μ :=
        ih (fun k ↦ I k.succ) (mem_piFinset.2 fun k ↦ mem_piFinset.1 hI k.succ) |>.memLp.mono (by simp)
      exact h1.mul h2 (by simp [add_inv_self])
